Fields.Name: Disable Param: Network Test Version
Fields.Description: Exclude from the NT version or mark the ones to be excluded.

Fields.Name: Disable Param: Release Version
Fields.Description: Exclude from the product version or mark the items to be excluded.

Fields.Name: Reference ID: 1
Fields.Description: ID used for the item.

Fields.Name: Particle Variation ID
Fields.Description: Specify SFX variation (used to identify SFX in combination with TimeActEditor ID)

Fields.Name: Weight
Fields.Description: Weight. In kilograms.

Fields.Name: Base Value
Fields.Description: Base price

Fields.Name: Sell Value
Fields.Description: Selling price

Fields.Name: Behavior ID
Fields.Description: Behavior action ID applied when item is used.

Fields.Name: Replacement Item ID
Fields.Description: Item ID to add when item is consumed.

Fields.Name: Sort ID
Fields.Description: Determines ordering in menu.

Fields.Name: Message Text ID
Fields.Description: Message ID used when displaying the YesNo dialog.

Fields.Name: Max Held Count
Fields.Description: The maximum number of this item held.

Fields.Name: Icon ID
Fields.Description: Icon ID used for this item.

Fields.Name: Model ID
Fields.Description: Model ID used for this item.

Fields.Name: Shop Level
Fields.Description: Level that can be sold at the store

Fields.Name: Achievement ID
Fields.Description: The achievement ID this part is associated with, if any.

Fields.Name: Sequential Achievement ID
Fields.Description: The sequential achievement ID this part is associated with, if any.

Fields.Name: Legacy: Max Held Count
Fields.Description: The maximum number of this item held.

Fields.Name: Humanity Consumption
Fields.Description: The amount of humanity consumption on use.

Fields.Name: Dexterity over Start Value
Fields.Description: Skill over start value

Fields.Name: Goods Type
Fields.Description: The type of item.

Fields.Name: Reference Type
Fields.Description: ID category [Attack, Projectile, Special]

Fields.Name: Behavior Category
Fields.Description: There are effects whose parameters change depending on skills, magic, items, etc. (enchantment weapons, etc.), so set the effect for each action so that it can correspond to an effect such as 'powering up only weapon attacks'. Set 'None' for items that do not require settings, such as ballistas.

Fields.Name: Item Category
Fields.Description: Category for this item.

Fields.Name: Item Use Animation
Fields.Description: Set the animation to play when using the item.

Fields.Name: Interaction Menu Type
Fields.Description: Menu type that opens when using an item.

Fields.Name: Use Limit Category
Fields.Description: Limit usage based on applied SpEffect.

Fields.Name: Replace Category
Fields.Description: Condition category to add to call ID

Fields.Name: Enable as Host Player
Fields.Description: If ON, this item is usable if the user is a host player.

Fields.Name: Enable as Gray Phantom
Fields.Description: If ON, this item is usable if the user is a gray phantom player.

Fields.Name: Enable as White Phantom
Fields.Description: If ON, this item is usable if the user is a white phantom player.

Fields.Name: Enable as Black Phantom
Fields.Description: If ON, this item is usable if the user is a black phantom player.

Fields.Name: Enable in Multiplayer
Fields.Description: If ON, this item is usable in a multiplayer session.

Fields.Name: Enable only in Multiplayer
Fields.Description: If ON, this item is only usable if in a multiplayer session.

Fields.Name: Is Equippable
Fields.Description: If ON, this item can be equipped.

Fields.Name: Is Consumed
Fields.Description: If ON, this item can be consumed. This will remove one instance of the item upon consumption.

Fields.Name: Is Automatically Equipped
Fields.Description: If ON, this item is automaticlly equipped when picked up.

Fields.Name: Is Guidance Item
Fields.Description: If ON, this item is a stationary item.

Fields.Name: Is Unique Item
Fields.Description: If ON, this item is an unique item.

Fields.Name: Can Discard
Fields.Description: If ON, this item can be discarded.

Fields.Name: Can Deposit
Fields.Description: If ON, this item can be deposited into the repository.

Fields.Name: Disable if Right Hand is Empty
Fields.Description: If ON, this item cannot be used when the right-handed weapon is empty.

Fields.Name: Is Travel Item
Fields.Description: If ON, this item is considered a 'travel' item.

Fields.Name: Is Replenishable Item
Fields.Description: If ON, this item is automatically replenished.

Fields.Name: Is Restocked Item
Fields.Description: If ON, this item is automatically restocked.

Fields.Name: Is Enhancement Source
Fields.Description: If ON, this item is used to apply an 'enhancement' to equipment or self.

Fields.Name: Is Repairable Item
Fields.Description: IF ON, this item can be repaired.

Fields.Name: Is Drop Disabled in Multiplayer
Fields.Description: If ON, this item cannot be dropped in a multiplayer session.

Fields.Name: Is Disabled in PvP Arena
Fields.Description: If ON, this item cannot be used when in the PvP arena.

Fields.Name: Is Enabled only in PvP Arena
Fields.Description: If ON, this item can only be used in the PvP arena.

Fields.Name: Is Early Cancel Enabled
Fields.Description: If ON, this item's usage can be cancelled early.

Fields.Name: Are SpEffect Modifiers Applied
Fields.Description: If ON, SpEffect modifiers are applied.

Fields.Name: Synchronized Item ID
Fields.Description: If the item count is changed, items with the same ID will be changed at the same time. 0 means no item is synchronzied.

Fields.Name: Reference ID: 2
Fields.Description: ID used for the item.

Fields.Name: Weapon ID
Fields.Description: Weapon ID to use to populate weapon parameters for offensive items.

Fields.Name: Vagrant Item Lot ID
Fields.Description: -1 No vagrant 0 No lottery 1  With lottery

Fields.Name: Vagrant Enemy Item Lot ID
Fields.Description: -1 No drop 0 No lottery 1  With lottery

Fields.Name: Vagrant Bonus Item Lot ID
Fields.Description: -1 No drop 0 No lottery 1  With lottery

Fields.Name: Particle ID: Cast
Fields.Description: SFX ID triggered when the item is casted.

Fields.Name: Particle ID: Fire
Fields.Description: SFX ID triggered when the item is fired.

Fields.Name: Particle ID: Effect
Fields.Description: SFX ID triggered after the item is fired.

Fields.Name: Obtain Medal Emblem
Fields.Description: Is it a condition to obtain the medal emblem?

Fields.Name: Is Bonfire Warp Item
Fields.Description: If ON, item usage is blocked if warp prohibition is active.

Fields.Name: Is Usable on Ladder
Fields.Description: If ON, the item can be used whilst on a ladder.

Fields.Name: Usable before Multiplayer Session
Fields.Description: Whether items can be used between session probability and initial synchronization

Fields.Name: Can Use Multiple
Fields.Description: If ON, multiple instances can be used simultaneously.

Fields.Name: Use Reference ID 2 when Duel-Wielding
Fields.Description: If ON, apply the reference ID 2 parameter if duel-wielding a weapon.

Fields.Name: Is Affected by Warp Prohibition
Fields.Description: If ON, then warp prohibition will disable this item.

Fields.Name: Is Usable when Multiplayer Penalty is Active
Fields.Description: If ON, then this item is usable when a multiplayer penalty has been applied. Otherwise, it is not usable.

Fields.Name: Replenishment Type
Fields.Description: The type of replenishment to apply when replenishing this item.

Fields.Name: Automatic Replenishment Type
Fields.Description: The type of automatic replenishment available, and whether it is enabled or disabled by default.

Fields.Name: Can be Dropped
Fields.Description: If ON, this item can be dropped.

Fields.Name: Is Local Player Sound Playback Only
Fields.Description: Is the sound playback when used only played for the using player.

Fields.Name: Max Repository Count
Fields.Description: The maximum number of this item that can be stored in the repository system.

Fields.Name: HUD Icon ID
Fields.Description: The icon ID for the the weapon panel GUI.

Fields.Name: Sale Value
Fields.Description: Price the item is on sale for.

Fields.Name: Re-use Time
Fields.Description: The usage cooldown. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Sound ID: On Use
Fields.Description: The sound ID to play when the item is used.
